name: Passover Stuffing with Chestnuts & Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion and celery in margarine in a medium-size skillet, covered, over medium heat until tender, 8-10 minutes. Scrape into a bowl.
2. Soak matzohs in water to cover for 3-5 minutes. Drain; squeeze dry. Add to the bowl.
3. Add chestnuts, mushrooms, thyme, rosemary, sage, parsley, salt, pepper, and eggs. Stuff the turkey, and roast as you ordinarily would. Alternatively, bake stuffing in a greased shallow 2-quart oven-proof casserole in a preheated moderate oven (350°F) for 45 minutes.
